ops.title: cc-guides renders can't land .github/workflows deltas (GITHUB_TOKEN lacks workflows:write)
ops.description: Proven on captain-hook run 29675152517: a docs-build fragment change (cc-skills 2fc32523, timeout 45→12) makes the render delta include .github/workflows/docs.yml, and the guides action's GITHUB_TOKEN cannot push workflow-file edits — push rejected ×3, render never lands. This blocks fleet propagation of ANY workflow-fragment change (incl. planned docs CI quality gates) on every consumer's daily cron. Also: cc-guides gitPush discards git stderr, hiding GitHub's refusal message. Fix ideas: fine-grained PAT (contents+workflows) as a fleet secret consumed by guides.yml (yasyf is a user account — per-repo secret sweep), or split workflow-file deltas out of renders; plus patch cc-guides gitPush to surface stderr. Near-term workaround: local `cc-guides render` + push per repo.
